action_set_definitions.name: get_project_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves global project constraints, including the Volatility Factor and general sprint settings.

action_set_definitions.name: search_backlog
action_set_definitions.description: Searches for backlog items filtering by feature name and priority level.

feature.description: The name of the feature (e.g., 'Cross-Border Payments').

priority.description: The priority level to filter by (e.g., 1).

action_set_definitions.name: get_item_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed information for a specific backlog item, including effort points, status, tags, and dependencies.

item_id.description: The unique identifier of the backlog item.

action_set_definitions.name: get_sprint_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of a specific sprint, including allocated points and available capacity.

sprint_number.description: The ID or sequence number of the sprint (1 or 2).

action_set_definitions.name: assign_item_to_sprint
action_set_definitions.description: Assigns a specific backlog item to a designated sprint.

item_id.description: The ID of the task to assign.

sprint_id.description: The ID of the target sprint.

state_description.backlog_items: A list of all user stories and tasks in the backlog.
state_description.sprints: A list of sprint objects containing their capacity and assigned tasks.

backlog_items.title: [PRODUCTION] Mobile UI for Payments [Consumer of PAY-101]
